description: Made of nylon for enhanced durabilityOne large roomy main compartment with two pouches for stowing away essentialsSeparate chamber for laptop with a velcro fastenerOne large zippered compartment on the front for storing essentialsTwo small zippered compartments on the front, one on top with brand logo printed and one close to the bottom with printed brand name and logoPadded, adjustable shoulder strap with mesh on the inner side for comfort and better ventilationSingle shoulder strap with printed brand name to sling the bag across the chestMesh on the back for improved breathabilityErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBrand tab appliqued on the sideHaul loop for handling easeBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life
